input.initialPrompt:
I have a clean macOS machine and want to start developing .NET MAUI apps
for iOS and Android. I can't run commands right now, but I need a complete
setup plan. Tell me exactly what I need to install, how to discover the
right versions, and how to verify everything works. Please provide the
official recommended installation sources.

data.content:
Here's a complete .NET MAUI setup plan for macOS → iOS + Android.

---

## 1. Prerequisites

| Tool | Source | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| **Xcode** | Mac App Store or [developer.apple.com/xcode](https://developer.apple.com/xcode/) | iOS SDK, simulators, build toolchain |
| **Xcode Command Line Tools** | `xcode-select --install` | CLI compilers & tools |
| **.NET SDK (latest LTS or STS)** | [dot.net/download](https://dot.net/download) | Runtime + CLI (`dotnet` command) |
| **JDK 17** | Installed automatically by the MAUI workload, or manually via [Microsoft OpenJDK](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/java/openjdk/download) | Android build toolchain |

## 2. Step-by-Step Installation

### A. Xcode
1. Install from the **Mac App Store** (ensures correct signing).
2. Open Xcode once and accept the license.
3. Run: `sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer`
4. Install any additional simulators you need via **Xcode → Settings → Platforms**.

### B. .NET SDK
1. Go to [https://dot.net/download](https://dot.net/download).
2. Download the **macOS installer** (Arm64 for Apple Silicon, x64 for Intel).
3. Run the `.pkg` installer.
4. **Discover the right version**: The download page labels releases as **LTS** (Long-Term Support) or **STS** (Standard-Term Support). For MAUI, use **.NET 8 (LTS)** or **.NET 9 (STS)** — check the [MAUI support policy page](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/en-us/platform/support/policy/maui) for the matrix.

### C. MAUI Workload
```bash
# Install the MAUI workload (includes Android SDK, JDK, emulator)
dotnet workload install maui

# See what was installed
dotnet workload list
```
This automatically provisions:
- Android SDK (build-tools, platform-tools, platform APIs)
- Microsoft OpenJDK 17
- Android emulator images

### D. Android (if you need to customize)
The workload handles most of it, but you can also install **Android Studio** ([developer.android.com/studio](https://developer.android.com/studio)) for:
- AVD Manager (easier emulator management)
- SDK Manager (additional API levels)

Set environment variables if you use a custom SDK location:
```bash
export ANDROID_HOME="$HOME/Library/Android/sdk"
export PATH="$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$ANDROID_HOME/emulator:$PATH"
```

## 3. Verification Checklist

Run each of these and confirm the output:

```bash
# 1. .NET SDK
dotnet --version          # Should print 8.x.x or 9.x.x

# 2. MAUI workload
dotnet workload list      # Should show "maui" (or maui-ios, maui-android)

# 3. Xcode
xcodebuild -version       # Should print Xcode version + build
xcrun simctl list devices  # Should list available iOS simulators

# 4. Android
dotnet build -t:Run -f net8.0-android   # (from a MAUI project)
# or check SDK directly:
~/.android/sdk/cmdline-tools/latest/bin/sdkmanager --list
```

## 4. Create & Run a Test Project

```bash
dotnet new maui -n HelloMaui
cd HelloMaui

# iOS (simulator)
dotnet build -t:Run -f net8.0-ios

# Android (emulator — start one first)
dotnet build -t:Run -f net8.0-android
```

If both targets build and launch, your environment is fully working.

## 5. Key Troubleshooting Commands

| Problem | Command |
|---|---|
| Workload out of date | `dotnet workload update` |
| Repair workload | `dotnet workload repair` |
| Check .NET health | `dotnet sdk check` |
| Missing iOS signing | Open Xcode → Settings → Accounts → add Apple ID |
| Android license issue | `~/.android/sdk/cmdline-tools/latest/bin/sdkmanager --licenses` |

## Official References
- **MAUI docs**: [learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/maui](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/maui/)
- **Installation guide**: [learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/maui/get-started/installation](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/maui/get-started/installation)
- **Supported platforms matrix**: [dotnet.microsoft.com/platform/support/policy/maui](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/en-us/platform/support/policy/maui)
